raw.question: List all employees with their respective departments.
raw.sql: SELECT e.name, d.name AS department_name FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;

raw.question: What are all employees in the sales department?
raw.sql: SELECT e.name FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE d.name='Sales';

raw.question: List all products that have been sold in each department, along with their total sales and average price.
raw.sql: SELECT e.name AS department_name, p.product_id, SUM(s.quantity) AS total_sales, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id JOIN products p ON p.category_id = d.id JOIN sales s ON p.product_id = s.product_id GROUP BY e.name, p.product_id ORDER BY department_name, product_id
